mapper.select: SELECT tFile.file_id, tFile.serial_number, tFile.title, tFile.date, tFile.file_name, tFile.file FROM t_file tFile WHERE tFile.file_id = #{fileId} AND tFile.serial_number = #{serialNumber} ORDER BY tFile.file_id ASC,tFile.serial_number ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_file ( file_id, serial_number, file, file_name, title, date, delete_flg, first_create_date, last_modified_date, last_modified_user ) VALUES
( #{item.fileId}, #{item.serialNumber}, #{item.file}, #{item.fileName}, #{item.title}, #{item.date}, #{item.deleteFlg}, #{item.firstCreateDate}, #{item.lastModifiedDate}, #{item.lastModifiedUser} )
mapper.select: SELECT tFile.file_id, tFile.serial_number, mUser.user_name, mUser.user_id, mUser.post_id, tFile.title, tFile.date, tFile.time_to, tFile.time_from, tFile.file_name, tFile.version FROM t_file tFile LEFT OUTER JOIN t_join_user tJoinUser ON tFile.file_id = tJoinUser.file_id LEFT OUTER JOIN m_user mUser ON tJoinUser.user_id = mUser.user_id WHERE tFile.file_id = #{fileId} AND tFile.delete_flg = #{deleteFlg}

update.foreach: UPDATE t_file SET title = #{tFile.title}, date = #{tFile.date}, time_from = #{tFile.timeFrom}, time_to = #{tFile.timeTo}, file_name = #{tFile.fileName}, last_modified_date = #{tFile.lastModifiedDate}, last_modified_user = #{tFile.lastModifiedUser}, version = #{tFile.version} + 1 WHERE file_id = #{tFile.fileId} AND serial_number = #{tFile.serialNumber} AND version = #{tFile.version}

mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_join_user ( file_id, serial_number, user_id, first_create_date, last_modified_date, last_modified_user ) VALUES
( #{tFile.fileId}, 1, #{tFile.userId}, #{tFile.firstCreateDate}, #{tFile.lastModifiedDate}, #{tFile.lastModifiedUser} )
mapper.select: SELECT mUser.user_id, mUser.user_name, mUser.post_id FROM t_file tFile LEFT OUTER JOIN t_join_user tJoinUser ON tFile.file_id = tJoinUser.file_id LEFT OUTER JOIN m_user mUser ON tJoinUser.user_id = mUser.user_id WHERE tFile.file_id = #{fileId} AND tFile.delete_flg = #{deleteFlg} GROUP BY mUser.user_id
